# Client Risk Profiling Ips

> KYC-lite risk questionnaire, risk-score computation, and IPS draft tying client goals to mandate with FATCA/CRS checks

**Category:** Workflow · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** kyc · risk-profiling · ips · suitability · fatca · crs · client-onboarding

## What this does

KYC-lite risk questionnaire, risk-score computation, and IPS draft tying client goals to mandate with FATCA/CRS checks

Specifies 6 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **client_id** *(text, required)* — Client Identifier
- **questionnaire_responses** *(json, required)* — Risk Questionnaire Responses
- **risk_score** *(number, optional)* — Computed Risk Score (0-100)
- **risk_profile** *(select, optional)* — Risk Profile
- **investment_horizon_years** *(number, required)* — Investment Horizon (years)
- **liquidity_needs** *(text, optional)* — Liquidity Needs
- **goals** *(rich_text, required)* — Client Goals
- **fatca_crs_declared** *(boolean, required)* — FATCA/CRS Declaration Complete
- **ips_status** *(select, required)* — IPS Status

## What must be true

- **questionnaire:** MUST: All mandatory questions answered; questionnaire version captured; retained 7 years
- **questionnaire → retention_years:** 7
- **scoring:** MUST: Deterministic scoring function versioned; score recomputed on any response change
- **scoring → versioned:** true
- **profile_mapping:** MUST: Risk score maps to profile bands. 0-20 conservative, 21-40 moderate, 41-60 balanced, 61-80 growth, 81-100 aggressive
- **ips_required_sections:** MUST: IPS includes goals, horizon, risk profile, liquidity, constraints, benchmark, rebalancing policy
- **ips_required_sections → required_sections:** goals, horizon, risk_profile, liquidity, constraints, benchmark, rebalancing
- **fatca_crs:** MUST: FATCA/CRS declaration collected before IPS can be signed; flags escalate to compliance
- **fatca_crs → blocks_signing_when_missing:** true
- **signing:** MUST: Client signs IPS electronically with audit trail; CFA countersigns
- **signing → dual_signature:** true

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Questionnaire Submitted Successfully** — when questionnaire_responses exists; every mandatory question has a response, then Questionnaire persisted. _Why: All mandatory questionnaire fields captured._
- **Risk Profile Computed** — when questionnaire_responses exists, then Profile assigned. _Why: Risk score computed and mapped to profile band._
- **Ips Generated** — when risk_profile is set; goals and horizon are captured, then IPS draft ready for review. _Why: IPS draft produced from questionnaire and profile._
- **Ips Signed** — when client signature captured; cfa countersignature captured; fatca_crs_declared eq true, then IPS active; trading may begin. _Why: Client and CFA have electronically signed the IPS._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Questionnaire Incomplete** — when any mandatory question lacks a response, then Client prompted to complete missing fields. _Why: One or more mandatory questions unanswered._ *(error: `PROFILING_QUESTIONNAIRE_INCOMPLETE`)*
- **Fatca Crs Flagged** — when fatca_crs declaration indicates foreign tax residency or US person, then Case routed to compliance. _Why: FATCA/CRS declaration reveals cross-border tax status needing review._ *(error: `PROFILING_FATCA_CRS_FLAGGED`)*

## Errors it can return

- `PROFILING_QUESTIONNAIRE_INCOMPLETE` — Please complete all required questions.
- `PROFILING_FATCA_CRS_FLAGGED` — Your declaration requires compliance review.
- `PROFILING_NOT_FOUND` — Client profile not found.

## Events

**`profiling.questionnaire_submitted`** — Client finished the questionnaire
  Payload: `client_id`

**`profiling.profile_computed`** — Risk profile assigned
  Payload: `client_id`, `risk_score`, `risk_profile`

**`profiling.ips_drafted`** — IPS draft generated
  Payload: `client_id`

**`profiling.ips_signed`** — IPS fully signed
  Payload: `client_id`

**`profiling.fatca_crs_flagged`** — Cross-border tax flag raised
  Payload: `client_id`

## Connects to

- **fund-creation-lifecycle** *(recommended)* — Client IPS guides fund mandate selection
- **pre-trade-compliance-checks** *(required)* — IPS constraints feed pre-trade compliance
- **immutable-audit-log** *(required)* — All questionnaire and signing events must be audited
- **popia-compliance** *(required)* — Client personal information handling must satisfy POPIA
